calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-23-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomasina Reed appeared by telephone for Florence Reed.

Ms. Reed stated that she read the Probate Examiner's notes, that she is trying to obtain information and that she will file a substitution of attorney. The Petition for Letters of Administration is taken off calendar. Counsel can file a proper petition if needed.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Chu. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-30-2016 Continued To Jan-23-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Louise Reed in Propria Persona.

Ms. Reed stated that she needs another continuance and that her sister in Los Angeles will correct her filings. The Court stated that it has concerns regarding Ms. Reed getting this complete. Ms. Reed stated that she will either obtain representation or will have her sister take over. The petition for Letters of Administration was continued to January 23, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that if this is not in order at that time counsel will need to appear.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
